chapter_title.ar: بَابُ حَدِّ الْمَرَضِ الَّذِي يَجُوزُ لِلرَّجُلِ أَنْ يُفْطِرَ فِيهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 39 – The limit of the illness which is allowed for the man that he does not Fast therein

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/307)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/307)
text: الصَّائِمُ إِذَا خَافَ عَلَى عَيْنَيْهِ مِنَ الرَّمَدِ أَفْطَرَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Hammad, from Hareyz,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The Fasting one, when he fears upon his eyes from the conjunctivitis, breaks’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Hammad from Hariz who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘If a fasting person is afraid about the illness of his eyes, he is allowed to eat.’”
